programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: Mukesh is a widower and has a 28-year-old so Rahul. They live together and rarely talk amicably with each other. Rahul thinks his father is too weird for his age whereas Mukesh thinks why Rahul constantly judges him for his choices.

programme.title: Love, Bites
programme.desc: Love, bites is a romantic drama where the story revolves around the lives of Karthik, an artist, and Meghna, scientist. Their sexual chemistry is obvious to everyone. Even to those who haven’t seen them together, since they like to flaunt the hickeys on their body. But something changes in their equation when the hickey becomes a bridge of memory that leads to an old sexual encounter Meghna had which Karthik finds out about. Will Meghna be able to help Karthik erase the marks of her past? Or will Karthik just to have to wake up to a realization that the past, even though it haunts, might not be real.

programme.title: Dum Dum Deega Deega
programme.desc: The solution to your problem is often hidden in the problem itself; all you need is a different outlook. The story of a beggar child, Ajju, who lives on the streets of Mumbai, but dreams big. He challenges his unfortunate fate, with nothing but a 'different outlook' towards the situation he faces.

programme.title: Naamkaran
programme.desc: When it comes to new beginnings, families have a way of always being there. Sometimes it's as simple as a good- morning forward. But for Jay, it's something slightly more dramatic. Watch Naamkaran, as Jay and his (uninvited) family take on a new challenge.

programme.title: One Faith
programme.desc: Sometimes, all it takes for a melting pot to turn into a blazing furnace is a mere spark. Especially in a country like ours, where multiple faiths co-exist and cross paths every day. This is the day in the life of India, where two dominant forces face-off in a battle of who-blinks-first. And only one faith will triumph.

programme.title: Exchange Offer
programme.desc: A complaint registered to the manufacturing company for a dead computer brings back nostalgia and surprises in the life of a retired school principle who is living a mundane life.

programme.title: Laugh
programme.desc: A film about who we were and who we've become , how socialising was and where its reached ,how something as simple as laughing has taken a complicated turn

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: 10 years ago, a boy abandoned his alcoholic mother. Now a man, he returns to meet her.

programme.title: ABC

programme.desc: An experimental night in bed ends up with a mark for the world to see. As the world looks at the mark left in bed, the couple is forced to look inside themselves and their relationship.

programme.title: Aamad
programme.desc: "Aamad" in essence is the story of a father and son and their shared inheritance of loss. An inheritance that tears them apart and yet binds them together. Abhay returns home to find his father on his deathbed. Old painful memories resurface. Will he be able to make amends for the faults of his past? As his father passes on, will this be Abhay’s rites of passage? Will Abhay heed the call of the bloodline, despite the tinkering strains of the past?

programme.title: Bhagwaan - The Faith
programme.desc: A final chance meeting with a mysterious old homeless man changes everything they’ve experienced that day. The story delves into how deep their faith truly is and how people worship gods. Some use faith and god as a means of solace while others as a crutch for a troubling life.

While the intent of the friend seem questionable, the story is about why she trusts him more than anyone else with this issue that she is facing

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Breaking up ≠ getting over someone right? ‘Yesterday’ is a window into the most emotionally eventful 24 hours that Gautam has had in years.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Jurassic Attack
programme.desc: A group of soldiers attempting to rescue a hostage from a terrorist crash land into unfamiliar jungles which are inhabited by a group of long hidden dinosaurs. Now they must find a way out of this isolated valley before becoming prey for prehistoric predators.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. A riveting, intense story of Crime and Corruption, Loyalty and Love, Brutality and Tenderness, LAWLESS is a rich addition to the American Gangster Canon.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: American Boogeywoman
programme.desc: True Story that follows America’s most notorious Female Serial killer. Based on Aileen Wuorno’s early life. Back in 1976 a young Aileen arrives in Florida searching for a new life, marries a wealthy yacht club president to start as part of Florida’s high society. Tormented by her inner demons she surrenders to her murderous impulses havoc in the peaceful community.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Untraceable
programme.desc: A FBI secret service agent, gets caught in a deadly cat-and-mouse game with a serial killer who knows that people will log onto an "untraceable" website where he conducts violent and painful murders LIVE on the net. The more people who log on and enter the website, the quicker and more violently the victim dies.

programme.title: The Free Fall
programme.desc: The Free Fall is a deeply personal horror thriller, a mind bending pressure cooker that constantly challenges us, hurling us towards one of the most shocking cinematic reveals imaginable. After attempting to take her own life, a young woman must wrestle with an overbearing husband and the only way out of this hell, is to fall into it.

programme.title: Cold Skin
programme.desc: In 1914, a young man arrives at a remote island near the Antarctic Circle to take the post of weather observer only to find himself trapped in a watchtower besieged by deadly creatures which live in hiding on the island.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Spytime
programme.desc: Anacleto, a former secret agent, is forced to come out of retirement and protect his son, Adolfo, when his arch-enemy, Vazquez, breaks out of prison and targets him

programme.title: Sky Sharks
programme.desc: Deep in the ice of the antarctic, a team of geologists uncover an old Nazi warship still intact where dark experiments had occurred. In order to conquer the world, the Nazis created rocket-powered sharks whose pilots are genetically mutated, super soldiers with supernatural powers who were able to fly & destroy

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day Of Reckoning
programme.desc: John awakens from a coma to discover his wife and daughter were murdered in a brutal home invasion. Haunted by images of the attack, he vows to kill the man responsible: The fight pits John against Andrew Scott and an army of genetically enhanced warriors; meanwhile, he must contend with a Uni Sol in relentless pursuit.

programme.title: The Good Boss
programme.desc: What makes a Good Boss? Is your boss good? Manipulative? Shamelessly meddles in his employees private lives? Crosses every line imaginable. The Good Boss is a biting character study with academy award winner Javier Bardem. To win the competition, the manipulative "good boss" unknowingly starts an explosive chain reaction with wild consequences.

programme.title: The Beast
programme.desc: In the near future artificial intelligence is in control of everyone's lives where emotions have become a threat. Set across three different time periods 1910, 2014 and 2044. Our actress (Léa Seydoux) decides to purify her DNA in a machine & continually falls in love with different incarnations of Louis (George MacKay)

programme.title: Rebel
programme.desc: A young man leaves Belgium to help war victims in Syria, but is forced to join an armed group and is left stranded in AL Raqqa. While at home his little brother becomes easy prey for jihadi recruiters. The only thing their mother has left with is to protect: her Son.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration
programme.desc: Terrorists kidnap the Russian Prime Minister's two kids, take Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant and threaten to blow up a reactor. Four Universal Soldiers go in but are no match to a Next Generation UniSol. The world's only hope is to reactivate decommissioned Universal Soldier Luc Deveraux.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Redline is an auto/action thriller that features an extensive exotic car collection Phantom Rolls Royce, Lamborghini Murcielago, Enzo Ferrari, Ferrari F430, Ferrari Scaglietti and two Mercedes SLR McLaren AMGs. The film follows a gorgeous young automobile fanaticize driver who becomes part of illegal drag racing competitions organized by exotic car fanatics.

programme.title: Rememory
programme.desc: You can’t escape them. They’re everywhere. They bring tears to our eyes. They make us laugh. They bring us pain. Gordon a visionary inventor of the Rememory machine that allows him to see memories. He dies in his office. Is it murder? Sam investigates by using the machine "borrowed" from Gordon's wife. He looks at memories of others involved. REMEMORY is a noir mystery Thriller.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: American Boogeywoman
programme.desc: True Story that follows America’s most notorious Female Serial killer. Based on Aileen Wuorno’s early life. Back in 1976 a young Aileen arrives in Florida searching for a new life, marries a wealthy yacht club president to start as part of Florida’s high society. Tormented by her inner demons she surrenders to her murderous impulses havoc in the peaceful community.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: Every 23rd spring for 23days, it gets to eat…Stranded on a lonely road, a school bus full of high school players must defend themselves from the Creeper, the winged, flesh-eating terror - ancient beast that resurfaces on the earth every 23 years to feed.

programme.title: King Lear
programme.desc: King Lear poses the question: What does it mean to be human? Its subtitle could be Being Human. Cruelty, barbarity, savagery, kindness, tenderness, love, in a world that gives not very much back. Set in the fictional present, an aging King invites disaster when he abdicates to his corrupt, toadying daughters, and rejects his loving and honest one.

programme.title: The Beast

programme.desc: THE HURT LOCKER is an intense portrayal of elite soldiers who have one of the most dangerous jobs in the world: disarming bombs during the Iraq War.

programme.title: Tawaif
programme.desc: Due to unforeseen circumstances, Dawood accepts Sultana, a courtesan, as his wife in spite of being in love with author Kaynat. His life soon changes when he finds himself falling for Sultana.

programme.title: Lohe Ke Haath
programme.desc: Gayatri's mother-in-law Bindu Devi tries to set fire to her on her wedding night for her dowry; her husband Jainath is equally responsible for this attempt. Gayatri is saved by Triloki, but he doesn't have good intentions: he rapes her. Gayatri saves another woman from getting molested and both meet Maataji, who is also a victim of dowry. Maataji trains helpless women to fight against injustice and Gayatri turns into a rebel.

programme.title: Aadmi
programme.desc: Vijay, a factory supervisor, is falsely accused and arrested for killing his family. Just when he is at his lowest point, an inspector offers to help him in return for capturing the son of a gangster.

programme.title: Patthar Ke Phool
programme.desc: A young lady having grown up in a household full of love and admiration, Suraj is now a young adult who had no idea her father has been part of a dangerous mafia; she eventually falls in love with a police officer.

programme.title: Rakhwale
programme.desc: A Young man who is framed for a murder which he has not committed. He is sentenced to life imprisonment but escapes from jail to prove his innocence. Along the way in his mission he is helped by many individual.

programme.title: Suhana Safar
programme.desc: Enticed by his poetry, Sapna travels to India from the USA to meet poet Ujjwala. She meets a man, Sunil, who falls for her but decides to help her reach him in Phulwari.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Childhood friends Yash and Raja fall in love with Rani but their jealousy leads to the death of both Raja and Rani. When Yash comes across her lookalike, his obsession leads him down a dark path.

programme.title: Mangani
programme.desc: " All men sin and suffer but ho who suffers for the atonment of the sins of others is a great human. " In a small village, on the banks of the Ganges, lived Gopal, the only son of a soldier who had died on the battlefield while he was still a child daughter devi had great attachment to them. Gopal and Devi were playmates and when they grew up, they fell in love with each other. One day, a village belle who was to become an unwedded mother, was about to be thrown out of the village . The son of the headmen was equally to be blamed but nobody pointed out his mistake. It was Gopal who saved the girl from the mass fury and punished the headman's son . He turned his avowed enemy, Gopal's mother sent Gopal to another village where he got a job in the household of the Zamindar. Zamindar's son vilas came home in vacation and to entertain him, Gopal took him to his own village. When they arrived at the village temple Devi had been giving a dance rectical. The occasion was Janmashtmi, Vilas was introduced to Devi. He tried to flout her modesty. Gopal saved her and taught him the lesson of his life. Gopal bid farewell to devi and went to the city to seek a job Devi took a promise from him that he will not try to take the blame of others misdoings on him. His employer, Dhaniram's daughter Rangilee was about to become an unwedded mother too. Gopal took the blame on himself sethji agreed to give Rangile's hand in marriage to Gopal. Gopal left for his village to seek permission of him mother and Devi. Devi misunderstood him she thought he was the father of Rangilee's unborn child. She tried to commit suicide What happened of Rangilee ? Dear Pairous it is not the end but is father the beginning of a new life of a sugar human, To know him you will have to see MAANAVATA from beginning to end

programme.title: Luv Kush
programme.desc: After Ram returns to Ayodhya, Sita is forced to go into exile. She gives birth to twins Lav and Kush, who later go to Ayodhya to attain blessings of Ram and recite the Ramayan.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Childhood friends Yash and Raja fall in love with Rani but their jealousy leads to the death of both Raja and Rani. When Yash comes across her lookalike, his obsession leads him down a dark path.

programme.title: Mazdoor
programme.desc: Dinanath is a foreman in a textile mill who dreams of one day running his own mill more fairly. He leaves the mill after upsetting the management by supporting his mistreated co-workers. With the support and inspiration of a young orphan, Ashok, he has taken in, Dinanath raises the money to buy a property, leading to the eventual realization of his dream. Then Smita enters the picture and everything starts to go wrong.

programme.title: Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyar
programme.desc: Gangotri Pictures Pvt. Ltd's Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyaar is a love story that's set in a village. Seema (Lovely Joshi), who is a daughter of a high caste Pandit Deendayal, falls in love with an educated Dalit boy Nikhil (Uttam Kumar. When Pandit Deendayal doesn't approve of their love, the two lovers elope, only to be chased by Pandit Deendayal's henchmen, whom Nikhil kills one by one. Amidst all this, there is also a parallel story that speaks of an enmity between Pandit Deendayal and Thakur Surendra Singh Rana, whose enmity gets further fanned up by two villagers Abdul and Malkhi.

programme.title: Kuku Mathur Ki Jhand Ho Gayee
programme.desc: A film about a young man named Kuku who dreams of becoming a successful entrepreneur. When he gets a job at a wedding planning company, he sees it as his ticket to the good life. However, his lack of experience and the chaotic wedding planning industry lead to hilarious mishaps and adventures.

programme.title: Karobaar : The Business Of Love
programme.desc: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

programme.title: Shootout At Lokhandwala
programme.desc: A film based on a real-life gun battle between the Mumbai police and gangsters in Mumbai Lokhandwala Complex in 1991. The movie follows the story of a notorious gangster, and his team who terrorize the city with their crimes. As the police close in on them, a bloody shootout ensues, leaving many dead on both sides. The film explores the complex dynamics between law enforcement and organized crime in Mumbai's underworld.

programme.title: Bhoothnath
programme.desc: Banku and his parents move into their new home, the Nath Villa. Here, Banku meets the unfriendly ghost of the former owner. Not only does Banku befriend him but also helps him make his final journey.

programme.title: Zameer The Fire Within
programme.desc: A spoiled brat gets married to her professor despite several challenges. Soon after, he learns that his wife was responsible for the separation of his ex-girlfriend and he leaves her, never to return.

programme.title: Gali Gali Chor Hai
programme.desc: Bharat, a small-time artist, finds himself dealing with the effects of a corrupt system. In the process, he himself discovers his ideals and decides to fight for the rights of the common people.

programme.title: Nh10
programme.desc: Gurgaon professionals Meera and Arjun are shaken after Meera survives a brutal attack. Seeking escape, they take a desert holiday, but at a highway dhaba they witness hoodlums abducting a young girl.

programme.title: Suhaag
programme.desc: Best friends Ajay and Raj are goofy college-going boys, who love playing pranks on others. Ajay's life turns upside down after he finds out about a tragic incident related to his estranged father, which might put his friendship with Raj at stake.

programme.title: Vighnaharta Shree Siddhivinayak
programme.desc: Manav Mehta is a successful industrialist whose personal life is in disarray. His parents leave home because of his uncourteous behavior. After problems at work, his car breaks down on the way to work, and he unintentionally visits the Siddhivinayak temple. This visit changes his life.

programme.title: Gali Gali Chor Hai
programme.desc: Bharat, a small-time artist, finds himself dealing with the effects of a corrupt system. In the process, he himself discovers his ideals and decides to fight for the rights of the common people.

programme.title: Zameer The Fire Within
programme.desc: A spoiled brat gets married to her professor despite several challenges. Soon after, he learns that his wife was responsible for the separation of his ex-girlfriend and he leaves her, never to return.

programme.title: Nh10
programme.desc: Gurgaon professionals Meera and Arjun are shaken after Meera survives a brutal attack. Seeking escape, they take a desert holiday, but at a highway dhaba they witness hoodlums abducting a young girl.

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: The movie follows an insomniac office worker who befriends a charismatic soap salesman, and together they start an underground fight club as a way to cope with their mundane lives. As the club gains popularity, they become involved in a larger plan to undermine the consumerist society they live in.

programme.title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
programme.desc: To pursue his love interest, TV reporter Geeta, Raju misleads the police with false clues during a murder investigation. His lies soon land him in trouble with the police and the mafia.

programme.title: Gane Naye Purane
programme.desc: Relive the golden era of music with classic melodies, retro rhythms, and timeless tunes that never fade. A nostalgic trip for true old-school lovers!

programme.title: Kumar Sanu Alka Yagnik
programme.desc: Fall in love all over again with Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik! Their magical duets—full of passion, heartbreak, and nostalgia—are pure 90s gold.

programme.title: R D Burman – Musical Maverick
programme.desc: A powerhouse collection of R.D. Burman's iconic hits, blending innovation, emotion, and energy. From soulful ballads to electrifying grooves, experience the genius of Pancham Da that defined Bollywood's golden soundscape.

programme.title: Best Of 70s – The Golden Era
programme.desc: Step into Bollywood’s most soulful decade with this jukebox of evergreen melodies. A rich tapestry of romance, innocence, and timeless charm – pure nostalgia from the golden 70s.

programme.title: Best Of 90s – Filmy Beats Reloaded
programme.desc: Take a ride through the vibrant 90s with peppy love anthems, dramatic duets, and emotional melodies. This jukebox celebrates the signature style of Bollywood's musical revival decade.

programme.title: Rajesh Khanna – The Superstar's Anthems
programme.desc: Revisit the unmatched charm of Rajesh Khanna with this jukebox of unforgettable melodies. Romantic, philosophical, and heartfelt – these songs defined an era and a superstar.

programme.title: Jeetendra Hits The Jumping Jack
programme.desc: Dive into Jeetendra’s iconic hits—The Jumping Jack’s timeless energy! Relive the magic of Bollywood’s golden era with foot-tapping beats, romance, and pure nostalgia!

programme.title: Neetu Singh Evergreen Hits
programme.desc: Turn up the retro vibes with Neetu Singh’s greatest hits! A birthday playlist packed with nostalgia, romance, and endless charm.

programme.title: Superhits Of 90s
programme.desc: Relive the '90s with Superhits! Romantic melodies, peppy beats, and timeless nostalgia—dance, sing along, and fall in love all over again!

programme.title: Dharmendra He Man Of Bollywood
programme.desc: Time-travel through Dharmendra's iconic hits – the ultimate He-Man of Bollywood! Timeless romance, unforgettable melodies that define an era of pure masala magic!

programme.title: Alka Yagnik Superhit Singer
programme.desc: Press play on nostalgia! Alka Yagnik's velvet voice brings back memories with these evergreen hits that still give us goosebumps today.

programme.title: Dimple Kapadia & Neetu Singh
programme.desc: Dance through the disco era with Dimple & Neetu! Playful whispers, foot-tapping romance, and melodies that defined a generation’s dreams.

programme.title: Mithun Chakraborty
programme.desc: Get ready to groove with Mithun Da's greatest hits! From 'Disco Dancer' to romantic ballads, this collection is pure Bollywood retro gold.

programme.title: Best Of B R Chopra
programme.desc: Dive into these timeless tracks that shaped Hindi cinema's musical heritage. The golden touch of B.R. Chopra - where every song became legendary.

programme.title: Hema Malini Parveen Babi Hit Bollywood Divas
programme.desc: The Original Bollywood Divas! Hema's elegance + Parveen's sass = Unbeatable 70s magic. Press play for nostalgia in every note!

programme.title: Dance Hits
programme.desc: Pure nostalgia on the dance floor! Celebrate the vibrant sounds of old-school Hindi dance music with timeless beats and retro charm.

programme.title: Shahenshah Of Bollywood-83rd Birthday Special Vol 2
programme.desc: Iconic melodies of Amitabh Bachchan reflecting romance,pride, and cinematic brilliance.

programme.title: Zindagi Ka Safar
programme.desc: Dive into the emotions of life, with a collection of heartfelt songs that beautifully capture the highs and lows of life. Let these timeless tunes resonate with your emotions and experiences.

programme.title: Dilip Kumar – Tributes To A Legend
programme.desc: Celebrate the voice of a generation with songs immortalized by the charisma of Dilip Kumar. Soul-stirring ghazals, patriotic numbers, and emotional ballads that reflect a cinematic titan’s journey.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 01
programme.desc: What happens when a fearless Delhi boy meets a fiery Mumbai girl? Chaos, charm, and clashes ensue. Will opposites attract or collide? Watch Alright's new weekly web series - Delhi vs Mumbai's episode 1 - When Delhi guy meets Mumbai girl.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 02
programme.desc: In this hilarious episode 2 of Delhi vs Mumbai, our favorite duo is on an all-too-relatable mission: flat hunting! ?? From endless negotiations with brokers in Delhi ?? to squeezing into Mumbai’s tiny flats ???, the chaos is real. Will Chirag find his home in this city or not?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 03
programme.desc: Imagine living with your crush amidst the iconic Delhi vs Mumbai clash—where one city’s chaos meets the other’s charm, turning every day into a blend of cultures and a rom-com adventure. Sharing breakfasts, late-night talks, and unexpected quirks, is it a dream come true or a reality check? Living with your crush in such a whirlwind brings fantasy and reality head-to-head like never before!

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 04
programme.desc: What happens when opposites fall in love? Chaos, comedy, or the ultimate love story? Delhi vs Mumbai—where one orders butter chicken, the other swears by vada pav. One speeds through wide highways, the other navigates traffic like an art form. From “Bhai” to “Banta hai,” their worlds clash in a battle of slang, street food, and stubborn pride. But here’s the twist—somehow, between the endless debates and culture shocks, sparks fly. Is it war, or is it love? Maybe, just maybe, it’s both.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 05
programme.desc: Say no to Valentine’s Day when your boyfriend is too romantic, and you’re the complete opposite! One loves grand gestures, the other prefers chill vibes—can love survive this Delhi vs Mumbai clash?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 06
programme.desc: When your partner is a walking green flag, every day feels like a rom-com—thoughtful gestures, endless support, and no unnecessary drama. From remembering your coffee order to hyping you up like their full-time job, they seem too good to be true. But in a world full of red flags, is it possible to find someone this perfect, or is there a twist waiting to unfold?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 07
programme.desc: Who truly has your back—your boyfriend or your best friend? ?? In this episode of Delhi vs Mumbai, we put relationships to the ultimate test! From loyalty checks to emotional dilemmas, watch as Delhi and Mumbai episode 7 to prove whose squad reigns supreme.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 08
programme.desc: When your partner cheats on you, the signs can be subtle or right in your face—but are they real, or just overthinking? A sudden change in behaviour, secretive texts, and those mysterious "work calls" at odd hours—are you reading too much between the lines or just ignoring the signs?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 09
programme.desc: Ex ki waapsi is always when you’ve finally moved on. The memories resurface, the what-ifs linger… but will you turn the page or reopen the book? Is it fate giving you another chance, or just a test to see if you’ve really moved on?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 10
programme.desc: Holi with Girlfriend is nothing short of magical—colours in the air, laughter in every splash, and love in every stolen glance. As you chase each other with vibrant hues, the world fades, leaving just the two of you in a whirlwind of playful mischief and stolen kisses. Amidst the chaos of colours, one thing is certain—her smile is the brightest shade of happiness.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 11
programme.desc: When your girlfriend wants to pay, it’s a true test of modern love—are you chivalrous enough to insist, or progressive enough to accept? The debate begins: Is it about equality, or does footing the bill define a gentleman? The waiter awkwardly stands by as you both exchange glances, waiting to see who taps the card first. In the end, is love about splitting everything equally, or about knowing when to let the other person win?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 12
programme.desc: Ruhaani from Mumbai travels to Delhi to meet Chirag’s family—who also happens to be her boyfriend. As she navigates the warmth and chaos of Delhi's culture, she uncovers surprising truths about his family, their expectations, and where she truly stands in his life.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 13
programme.desc: In Episode 13, Ruhani’s lavish surprise for Chirag collides with his secret plan to move back to Delhi for his mother and a major opportunity, leading to an emotional confrontation that tests their love and leaves both with a bittersweet, unsent goodbye.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 14
programme.desc: In the gripping final episode of Delhi vs Mumbai, emotions run high as Chirag (Abhishek Kapoor) and Ruhani (Malhaar Rathod) face the ultimate test of love. With tough decisions about career, family, and their future together, will distance and city-based differences pull them apart — or will love triumph over all?

programme.title: Dude Ep 01
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 02
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 03
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 04
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 05
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 01
programme.desc: In a busy hospital, Trisha faces a tough night when an accident victim is rushed into the emergency ward. As she works to save his life, the victim’s panicked father lashes out at her, demanding faster treatment. But Trisha stays calm, knowing that fear often comes out as anger.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 02
programme.desc: Trisha steps up when it matters most. When a man begins to choke and the situation turns critical, Trisha doesn’t hesitate. With calm precision and unmatched courage, she performs a high-stakes procedure all on her own. What happens next is nothing short of remarkable. Her quick thinking and skill become the difference between life and death. Watch how one nurse turns pressure into action.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 03
programme.desc: Trisha decides to take a long leave from the hospital to spend much-needed time with her family. Just as she steps away, the hospital is hit with a major emergency. Without hesitation, Trisha returns to duty, putting others before herself and becoming a true hero in a time of crisis. Watch this heartfelt story of courage, sacrifice, and the dilemma between duty and family.

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 01
programme.desc: n Harshil’s mohalla, love arrives every Diwali — bright, sparkly… but never quite complete Every year he promises himself — this time I’ll confess! But between mithai, fireworks and nerves… he ends up saying, “maybe next Diwali.” This year, he’s all set to confess his love to his Diwali wali dost — but will she say yes? Or will a new twist steal the spotlight?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 02
programme.desc: In Harshil’s mohalla, love has finally met its competition. After years of dancing through every Diwali together, Anamika now takes the floor with Vishal — and suddenly, it’s not just a performance, it’s personal.

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 03
programme.desc: Harshil ke chehre pe muskaan kam aur dard zyada nazar aa raha hai — kyunki ab Anamika aur Vishal ki “perfect jodi” ek "forever jodi" banne jaa rahi hai. Par iss kahani mein sab kuch utna simple nahi jitna lagta hai — Vishal ne bhi dekh liya hai wo bond… wo Mohalle Wala Pyaar Kya usse lagega kuch gadbad hai? Kya Anamika samajh payegi kya chubh raha hai Harshil ko? Aur kya iss Diwali… ek dil tootega ya do dil judenge?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 04
programme.desc: This Diwali, not just diyas — hearts are breaking too Vishal’s jealousy has sparked a storm, and Harshil’s world just fell apart. One Ghargula shattered… but along with it, so did a bond built over years. Will Anamika see the truth before it’s too late?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 05
programme.desc: The fights. The silence. The misunderstandings. It all comes down to this night. As the mohalla lights up for Diwali, two hearts are still trying to find their way back to each other. Will Harshil and Anamika finally find their way back… or lose each other forever?

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 01
programme.desc: Episode 1 of Office Dancers takes you inside the world of three ordinary office-goers with one extraordinary secret — they are the dancing stars no one sees coming. By day, they’re buried in emails, meetings, and deadlines. By night, they’re chasing rhythm, passion, and dreams that refuse to stay hidden. This is where their journey begins — full of chaos, comedy, and courage.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 02
programme.desc: Our three office rebels are back — and the chaos only gets bigger. Between never-ending deadlines, secret rehearsals, and the constant fear of getting caught… will their double life survive another day? ?? This episode is a reminder that sometimes the smallest victories — a dance step nailed, a dream defended, a smile shared — are the ones that keep us alive in the middle of all the madness.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 03
programme.desc: The helmets are still on, but the stakes just got higher. Our office dancers are juggling tighter deadlines, tougher bosses, and an even bigger risk of exposure. In this episode, friendships are tested, rivalries heat up, and every beat brings them closer to the truth. Because sometimes the hardest battle isn’t with the world outside — it’s with the fear inside.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 04
programme.desc: An anonymous email lands in the inbox.With the threat ticking, our office dancers scramble to lock their alibis, juggle brutal deadlines, and figure out who’s watching. Trust wobbles, secrets leak, and every rehearsal feels like a trap. Will the masks stay on—or is this the episode their identities finally crack?

programme.title: Kaash Tum Hote
programme.desc: Amidst getting married to Simran, Adi falls in love with Mehek. But Mehek is not who she seems.

programme.title: Hijack
programme.desc: A plane is hijacked by six terrorists who demand the release of Rashid Omar, their accomplice, or else the hostages will be killed.

programme.title: Housefull
programme.desc: A mascot for bad luck, Aarush's life turns into comical chaos after his wife runs away on the honeymoon night.

programme.title: Paathshaala
programme.desc: A new English school-teacher ends up leading both, teachers and students, to revolt against the school management for what's right.

programme.title: Vaada Raha I Promise
programme.desc: When Duke meets with an accident, he is abandoned by his lover Nalini and friends, until a young boy enters his life and brings back the hope.

programme.title: Shirin Farhad Ki Toh Nikal Padi
programme.desc: A middle aged Parsi couple find love at the most unexpected places and...time!

programme.title: Sniff
programme.desc: Witness the adventures of India's first-ever spy superhero Sunny Gill, who's out to solve mysteries with his powerful nose!

programme.title: Rajdhani Express
programme.desc: Rajdhani Express is the story of Keshav, an errand boy for an arms trafficker who wants to escape his life of crime.

programme.title: Purani Jeans
programme.desc: Purani Jeans is a film based on the belief that friendship is like a pair of old jeans -- the more you wear them the better it gets.

programme.title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
programme.desc: A girl decides to sprint out of her own wedding and has people from not one but two countries chasing after her.

programme.title: Salaam-E-Ishq
programme.desc: Six couples face problems in their lives when fate forces them to move away from each other. They must overcome these issues in order to make their love triumphant.

programme.title: Kashmir Daily
programme.desc: Kashmir Daily Story of a Journalist. It highlights the core problems faced by today's generation of Unemployment and Drugs. From the origin of humanity, it has always been a battle between Good and Evil.

programme.title: Anwar Ka Ajab Kissa
programme.desc: Story of Anwar, a clumsy private detective who often gets stuck in hilariously troublesome situations because of his habit of getting involved in the personal lives of his cases.

programme.title: Teri Meri Kahaani
programme.desc: Three couples from three different eras find love and despite the trials and tribulations they face along the way, destiny seems determined to keep them together.

programme.title: Warning
programme.desc: WARNING is a 3D UNDERWATER film about seven friends stuck in a life-threatening crisis. The lucky ones will die first and the rest will go through the worst nightmares of their lives.

programme.title: Daud
programme.desc: Nandu, a petty thief, is on the run after stealing a mysterious package worth crores of rupees. Not just the police, but the local mafia is after him.

programme.title: Switchh
programme.desc: Stealing, speeding and doing it all in style. Get your heart racing as Vikrant Massey and gang plan the biggest con in #Switchh, now streaming only on #ErosNow.

programme.title: Metro Park S1 Ep 1
programme.desc: Kinjal enjoys the new suburban life while Kannan struggles to adjust. A techie Poojari comes over leaving them stunned.

programme.title: Metro Park S1 Ep 2
programme.desc: Kalpesh finally finds a smart and reliable help around the store, or at least we hope. Enters Bittu Amritraj!

programme.title: Metro Park S1 Ep 3
programme.desc: Kalpesh wants to get into insurance business, but the problem arrives when he has to clear the Insurance licence exam.

programme.title: Metro Park S1 Ep 4
programme.desc: Kalpesh finds that selling insurance is harder than he imagined. Kalpesh decides to aggressively launch his company.

programme.title: Metro Park S1 Ep 5
programme.desc: A karaoke machine from the yard-sale rekindles Kalpesh's hidden passion of becoming a Bollywood singer.

programme.title: Metro Park S1 Ep 6
programme.desc: Payal and her partner decide to change their ladies salon to unisex. Inauguration goes a bit out of hand.

programme.title: Metro Park S1 Ep 7
programme.desc: The family gets on an all-vegetable juice diet plan which Kalpesh and Payal find difficult to follow.

programme.title: Metro Park S1 Ep 8
programme.desc: Kinjal starts attending birthing classes along with Kannan. Kalpesh meanwhile introduces the game of cricket to Pankaj.

programme.title: Bajatey Raho
programme.desc: A hilarious con-comedy where a group of people decides to con the cunning businessman who is actually responsible for swindling them.

programme.title: Nh10
programme.desc: On their way to a weekend retreat, Arjun and Meera find their dream vacation turn into a nightmare when they cross path with a dangerous gang.

programme.title: Mr. White Mr. Black
programme.desc: Gopi is on a mission to fulfil his father's last wish. Little did he know that he's getting into a series of madcap situations!

programme.title: Dhama Chaukdi
programme.desc: Four underworld dons - Mani Aiyer from Madras, Pappu Yadav from Bihar, Lallan Pyare from UP and Sanjay Apte from Mumbai - are staunch enemies, having businesses in Mumbai. What happens as a result of this rivalry?
